reviews.review_description: Im hopeful this will be a more.realistic Track Craft.   Please continue to build this out. And maybe change the name. I can only imagine whats to come. With the right customization options, this will be a must have top seller.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review, we currently have a new version ready, where you will have a lot to try new cars (van, suv with trailer or muscle car) and also new tracks will be added to F1 Race Mode.

Of course, we are still working on the constant improvement and realistic behavior of the cars.

reviews.review_description: Thank you for this nice game I need to change Agility steering gear!

developer_response.body: We appreciate your feedback. Also, thanks for the improvement tip, we'll make it better.

reviews.review_description: I like the idea and the selection of cars for different modes. Plus, I love the combination of a pickup truck with trailer on the drift track, crazy. Once it has multiplayer, it's going to be a blast !
